title: Trump Is Dissatisfied With Iran’s Plan to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary: The proposal would have set aside questions about what to do with Iran’s nuclear program.

title: Investigators in Trump Assassination Attempt Look Through Bluesky for Suspect’s Motive
summary: Federal authorities are looking into whether Cole Tomas Allen posted on Bluesky as “coldforce,” who wrote and promoted liberal views that did not stand out on the left-leaning platform.

summary: The joke was recorded two days before the White House correspondents’ dinner, where a gunman tried to storm the press gala.

summary: The attack on a press dinner in Washington, which is being called an attempted assassination of President Trump, has also renewed the fight over reopening the Homeland Security Department.

title: Sergey Brin Moves to the Right, With a ‘MAGA Girlfriend’ by His Side
summary: After once backing liberal causes, the Google co-founder has praised President Trump, donated to Republicans and spent $57 million to try to block a California billionaire tax.

title: Ron DeSantis Aims to Add Four Republican House Seats in Florida Redistricting Push
summary: The Republican-controlled Legislature is meeting in Tallahassee this week to vote on the map, which would apply for the 2026 midterms if passed.

title: Virginia Court Weighs Legality of New Redistricting Map Approved Last Week
summary: Oral arguments on Monday morning lasted about an hour. It was not clear how justices would rule.

title: Rep. Thomas Kean Jr. of New Jersey Makes His First Statement About Mysterious Absence
summary: Representative Thomas Kean Jr. of New Jersey, who has missed nearly two months of votes in Washington, said he expected to fully recover from a “personal medical issue” but gave no other details.

title: King Charles Visits Trump’s Washington After Chaos From Press Dinner Shooting
summary: Presidents use state visits to show off all that is appealing about American culture. But the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner has cast a shadow over the visit.

summary: The state visit of King Charles III comes at a moment of tension over the war in Iran between President Trump and Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

summary: A new therapy has the potential to cure hundreds of diseases — and even reverse aging.

title: How the Trump Administration Ended Independent Science at E.P.A.

title: Pentagon Can Temporarily Require Escorts for Journalists

title: Supreme Court Appears Divided Over Roundup Weedkiller Case

summary: The sovereign wealth fund announced by Prime Minister Mark Carney will be far smaller than ones in other oil producers like Norway and the Middle East.

title: Canada’s New Route to Citizenship Has Thousands of Americans Lining Up to Apply
summary: Canada has opened a route to citizenship for people who can prove they have a Canada-born ancestor. Millions could qualify, and Americans are already lining up to apply.

summary: Ding’s approach to dressing, with his spectacular spectrum of sweaters, suited a contestant who remained ice-cube calm as he climbed up the show’s leaderboard.

title: Political Violence Is Reprehensible. That Doesn’t Make Trump Less Depraved.

title: Missouri and Illinois Face Severe Storms and Tornado Threat
